output: Batch 5 executed. Added undo/redo keyboard shortcuts in the video editor, added undo/redo buttons plus a history dropdown next to the save badge in the editor chrome, verified the changes with a repo-wide TypeScript check, and checkpointed progress to .megaplan/plans/implement-undo-redo-history-20260326-2240/execution_batch_5.json. No tests were run in this batch.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added undo and redo options to useKeyboardShortcuts and verified the keydown listener now handles Cmd/Ctrl+Z for undo and Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+Z plus Ctrl+Y for redo before the existing shortcut checks, with preventDefault on each path. Verified VideoEditorShell passes chrome.undo and chrome.redo into the hook.

Added undo and redo ghost icon buttons beside the save badge, disabled from chrome.canUndo and chrome.canRedo, and added a history dropdown in the editor chrome. Verified the dropdown renders checkpoint labels, trigger-type badges, and relative timestamps, each item jumps to its checkpoint, the footer exposes a Save checkpoint action, and the empty state text appears when no checkpoints are present.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the Cmd/Ctrl+Z and redo handlers run before the existing shortcut checks, call preventDefault, and Ctrl+Y triggers redo.

Confirmed the undo and redo buttons disable correctly when the stacks are empty, and the history dropdown shows labels, trigger-type badges, relative timestamps, a Save checkpoint action, and an empty state.
